entries.title: String Theory
entries.reflection_summary: Useful for reflective contrast between mathematically ambitious unification and the repo's explicit falsification posture.
entries.non_gating_reason: Secondary philosophical context, not a direct runtime or governance standard.

entries.title: The Unity of Science
entries.reflection_summary: Useful as a reflective bridge between unified-theory aspiration and disciplined evidence boundaries.
entries.non_gating_reason: Conceptual context only; it does not supply executable or legal validation criteria.

entries.title: Tao Te Ching
entries.reflection_summary: Useful for reflective language around balance and non-coercive order without treating it as runtime authority.
entries.non_gating_reason: Spiritual/philosophical material is intentionally kept outside the deterministic suite.

entries.title: Bhagavad Gita
entries.reflection_summary: Useful for reflective themes of duty, discernment, and aligned action under ethical tension.
entries.non_gating_reason: Scriptural material is reflective and non-binding for repo evidence claims.

entries.title: The Dhammapada
entries.reflection_summary: Useful for reflective language around mind training, conduct, and restraint.
entries.non_gating_reason: Spiritual material is reflective and not part of standards-first validation.

entries.title: The Koran
entries.reflection_summary: Useful for reflective comparison around guidance, accountability, and moral seriousness.
entries.non_gating_reason: Scriptural material remains explicitly outside runtime and governance pass/fail gates.
